creator: david@catwhisker.org
text:
On Thu, Jul 18, 2013 at 09:40:07PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of astro/gpsman,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/180642 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/180642
> ....

Sure; I submitted it.... :-)

Peace,
david   (current hat: prts/astro/gpsman maintainer)
